subtitle: SOCIAL EXPERIMENT
back_micro: BUYING THIS T-SHIRT WAS A MISTAKE.
social_experiment: We made a deliberately simple T-shirt, told people not to buy it, limited it to 73 pieces and priced it at €73. The point is not to pretend the number is meaningful. It is 60 + 13. It is also 3 × 21 + 10. Neither explanation helps. That is the experiment.
